title: Figure 3 from: Liu S-L, Ma H-X, He S-H, Dai Y-C (2019) Four new corticioid species in Trechisporales (Basidiomycota) from East Asia and notes on phylogeny of the order. MycoKeys 48: 97-113. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.48.31956
author: Liu, Shi-Liang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3 Dextrinocystiscalamicola (holotype, He 5701). a basidiomata b, f basidiospores c, g basidia d, h cystidia e, i cystidia-like branches in subiculum j subicular hyphae. Scale bars: 1 cm (a), 10 µm (b–j). b, c Taken in phloxine d, e taken in Melzer's reagent.
